backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management with CRUD operations, user profiles, trending analytics, similarity scoring, and role-based access control using MixinAuthorization for admin and user permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four high-confidence features related to debugging and fixing the admin route permissions check infinite loading state in frontend/src/App.tsx and frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, and configuration, with detailed descriptions of their functionality, state management, and integration points.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining custom OKLCH color system with CSS variables for light and dark themes, including primary, secondary, accent, destructive, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, "Beast Clipping" title, and module script loading /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, QueryClient provider, HomePage with video player and clip management, and AdminPage with comprehensive debug logging, timeout handling, and permission checks using useIsOwner hook.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays admin panel errors with error message display, retry functionality, and home navigation button.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying system statistics, user identity with copy-to-clipboard functionality, total clips count, and a table of trending clips with viral scores and analytics.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Card component for displaying individual video clips with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Scrollable list component that displays all saved clips using ClipCard components, handles clip selection and deletion, and shows loading/empty states.
Component that displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with scores, allowing users to select and apply suggested timestamps and titles to create new clips.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls (minutes/seconds), supporting both manual entry and auto-population from suggestions or selected clips.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header containing app branding, Internet Identity authentication button, and conditional admin panel navigation link for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation functionality. Displays error alerts and loading states for both video loading and AI clip generation.
Badge component that displays a viral potential score (0-100) with color-coded styling and icons (Flame, TrendingUp, Sparkles) based on score thresholds. Supports multiple sizes and optional label display.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Simple YouTube video player component that embeds a YouTube iframe with responsive 16:9 aspect ratio using the provided video ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook for fetching admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend actor. Returns loading states and error handling.
Mutation hook for AI-powered clip generation that currently uses mock data to suggest viral clips with timestamps and scores. Includes placeholder for future AI service integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Mutation hook for creating video clips that calculates viral scores based on duration and title characteristics. Saves clips to backend and invalidates related queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Query and mutation hook for fetching all clips and deleting individual clips. Manages deletion loading state and invalidates queries on successful deletion.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: State management hook for clip start/end timestamps with validation, formatting, and conversion utilities between minutes/seconds and total seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: React hook that checks if the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method, with extensive debug logging, timeout handling, and query caching via React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: React hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend using React Query, enabled only when the actor is available and not fetching.
Custom hook providing utility functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH-based color system, container settings, animations, and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking completed features, architectural decisions, and known issues including admin panel authentication problems and missing AI clip generation implementation.
